checks.title: Contacts Access Permission
checks.description: App requests access to user contacts, which is a dangerous permission that could expose sensitive personal data.
checks.remediation: Ensure contacts access is essential for core functionality. Implement runtime permission requests with clear user explanation.

checks.title: Fine Location Access
checks.description: App requests precise GPS location access. This is a dangerous permission that tracks user whereabouts.
checks.remediation: Consider using coarse location if precise coordinates aren't needed. Always explain location usage to users.

checks.title: Camera Access Permission
checks.description: App requests camera access, enabling photo/video capture capabilities.
checks.remediation: Verify camera access is necessary. Use runtime permissions and explain camera usage purpose.

checks.title: Microphone Access Permission
checks.description: App can record audio, potentially capturing private conversations.
checks.remediation: Limit audio recording to specific features. Provide clear audio recording indicators to users.

checks.title: SMS Read Permission
checks.description: App can read SMS messages, exposing OTPs and private communications.
checks.remediation: Use SMS Retriever API for OTP auto-read instead of READ_SMS permission.

checks.title: Call Log Access
checks.description: App can access call history, revealing communication patterns.
checks.remediation: Remove if not essential. This permission requires Play Store policy compliance.

checks.title: External Storage Write Access
checks.description: App can write to shared external storage, potentially accessing other apps' files.
checks.remediation: Use scoped storage (Android 10+) or app-specific directories instead.

checks.title: Internet Access
checks.description: App has network access capability. Normal permission but essential for data exfiltration.
checks.remediation: Standard permission. Ensure all network traffic uses HTTPS.

checks.title: AWS Access Key Detected
checks.description: Hardcoded AWS access key found. This could allow unauthorized AWS resource access.
checks.remediation: Remove hardcoded credentials immediately. Use AWS Cognito or secure backend for credential management.

checks.title: Google API Key Exposed
checks.description: Google API key found in resources. May allow quota theft or unauthorized API access.
checks.remediation: Restrict API key by package name and SHA fingerprint in Google Cloud Console.

checks.title: Hardcoded Password/Secret
checks.description: Potential hardcoded password or secret string detected in application resources.
checks.remediation: Never hardcode secrets. Use Android Keystore, encrypted SharedPreferences, or secure backend.

checks.title: Private Key Embedded
checks.description: Private cryptographic key found in APK. Severe security risk if key is valid.
checks.remediation: Remove private keys from APK immediately. Use secure key exchange protocols.

checks.title: Bearer Token Found
checks.description: Hardcoded bearer token detected. Could allow unauthorized API access.
checks.remediation: Tokens should be obtained at runtime through secure authentication flows.

checks.title: Stripe Live Secret Key
checks.description: Stripe production secret key detected. Could allow fraudulent transactions.
checks.remediation: Never embed Stripe secret keys in apps. Use Stripe's mobile SDKs with publishable keys only.

checks.title: GitHub Personal Access Token
checks.description: GitHub PAT found. Could allow repository access and code modifications.
checks.remediation: Revoke and regenerate the token. Use OAuth flows for GitHub integration.

checks.title: Firebase Analytics
checks.description: Firebase Analytics SDK detected. Collects app usage data and sends to Google.
checks.remediation: Ensure privacy policy discloses analytics usage. Provide opt-out mechanism.

checks.title: Google Analytics
checks.description: Google Analytics SDK detected. Tracks user behavior and demographics.
checks.remediation: Disclose in privacy policy. Consider privacy-focused alternatives like Plausible.

checks.title: Facebook SDK
checks.description: Facebook SDK detected. May share data with Meta for advertising purposes.
checks.remediation: Implement Limited Data Use mode. Provide clear consent for Facebook data sharing.

checks.title: AppsFlyer Attribution
checks.description: AppsFlyer SDK detected. Tracks app installs and marketing attribution.
checks.remediation: Ensure user consent before attribution tracking. Disclose in privacy policy.

checks.title: Adjust Attribution SDK
checks.description: Adjust SDK detected. Tracks marketing campaigns and user attribution.
checks.remediation: Implement consent management before tracking. Comply with GDPR/CCPA.

checks.title: Crashlytics
checks.description: Firebase Crashlytics detected. Sends crash reports with device information.
checks.remediation: Ensure no sensitive user data is included in crash reports. Disclose crash reporting.

checks.title: Google Ads SDK
checks.description: Google Mobile Ads (AdMob) detected. Displays targeted advertisements.
checks.remediation: Implement consent for personalized ads. Provide non-personalized ad option for EU users.

checks.title: Unity Ads
checks.description: Unity Ads SDK detected. Tracks user behavior for ad targeting.
checks.remediation: Implement GDPR consent flow. Provide opt-out for personalized ads.

checks.title: Debuggable Application
checks.description: App is debuggable, allowing attackers to attach debuggers and extract data.
checks.remediation: Set android:debuggable to false in release builds. Use BuildConfig.DEBUG for debug features.

checks.title: Backup Allowed
checks.description: App data can be backed up via ADB, potentially exposing sensitive data.
checks.remediation: Set android:allowBackup to false or use android:fullBackupContent to exclude sensitive data.

checks.title: Cleartext Traffic Allowed
checks.description: App allows unencrypted HTTP traffic, enabling man-in-the-middle attacks.
checks.remediation: Set usesCleartextTraffic to false. Use HTTPS for all network communications.

checks.title: Exported Component Without Permission
checks.description: Component is exported and accessible to other apps without permission protection.
checks.remediation: Set exported to false if component isn't meant to be accessed externally. Add permission requirements.

checks.title: Deep Link Handler
checks.description: App handles deep links which could be exploited if not properly validated.
checks.remediation: Validate all deep link parameters. Use App Links for verified domain ownership.

checks.title: Custom URL Scheme
checks.description: Custom URL scheme detected. Could be hijacked by malicious apps.
checks.remediation: Prefer App Links over custom schemes. Validate all incoming Intent data.

checks.title: Task Affinity Set
checks.description: Custom task affinity may enable task hijacking attacks.
checks.remediation: Set taskAffinity to empty string or remove if not needed.

checks.title: SingleTask Launch Mode
checks.description: SingleTask launch mode may be vulnerable to task hijacking.
checks.remediation: Use singleTask only when necessary. Implement additional activity validation.
